key.name: monitor-layout
key.description: JSON-encoded monitor arrangement including position, resolution, physical dimensions, and DPI overrides for each display.

key.name: enabled
key.description: When enabled, the daemon applies DPI-aware scaling to cursor movement at monitor boundaries. When disabled, raw movement passes through unmodified.

key.name: auto-start
key.description: When enabled, the DuaScreenAligner daemon is started via systemd on user login.

key.name: input-device
key.description: The evdev device path for the physical mouse to intercept (e.g., /dev/input/event5). Leave empty for automatic detection.

key.name: log-level
key.description: Controls the verbosity of daemon log output. Valid values: error, warn, info, debug.
